t_ch: 那谁来拍照呢？
t_en: Who's going to take the photo, then?

t_ch: 我带着机巧鸟呢。
t_en: I brought my cycrane.

t_ch: 我先前不是说，给大家准备了个惊喜吗？我这就去把人喊出来，噔噔噔噔——
t_en: Didn't I promise a happy surprise for everyone before? Let me call them over, ta-da!

t_ch: 我觉得，以全新的面貌回访过去直播的地点还不够。我们并肩作战这么久，有些观众老爷就一直在跟我打听你们的事。
t_en: I still think we need something more than just revisiting previous vlog spots with a new look. We've been fighting side by side for so long now that a few fans in the live stream have been asking me about you guys.

t_ch: 也多亏这些观众的支持，我们才能走到现在。
t_en: And it's only thanks to the support of these fans that we've been able to get where we are today.

t_ch: 所以，为了庆祝我拿到金色奖牌，也为了纪念我们的友谊，我开了个粉丝见面会，今天，我要带着这个金色奖牌，和大家一起分享我们的美好回忆。
t_en: So to celebrate me getting the gold medallion and also in celebration of our friendship, I've decided to hold a fan meet-and-greet. Today, I'll be bringing the gold medallion with me to share all our wonderful memories with everyone.

t_ch: 年轻人就是有朝气啊。
t_en: Young people sure are full of energy.

t_ch: 我们小桂子真的又懂事又可爱，比棉袄还贴心！
t_en: Little Gui gets it, and she's so cute! I feel closer to her than this blanket!

t_ch: 哇，你们真人比上镜好看多了！
t_en: Wow, you're even more pretty in real life than on the vlog!

t_ch: 啊，我不是说你们上镜不好看……
t_en: Ah, that's not to say that you're not pretty when on stream...

t_ch: 没事，我懂，镜头有畸变嘛。
t_en: It's fine. I get it. The camera adds ten pounds.

t_ch: 小妹妹，你这到底怎么做到的，尾巴闪闪的。
t_en: Hey miss, how'd you manage to do that? Your tail is sparkling.

t_ch: 这个…这个…这个是秘密，不能说。
t_en: It's... it's... it's a secret. I can't tell you.

t_ch: 噢，多半是你家的护理秘方吧，那我还是不问了。
t_en: Oh, it's probably your family's secret fur-care routine. I won't ask any more questions.

t_ch: 不得不说你好可爱啊。
t_en: I have to say, you really are so cute.

t_ch: 谢谢，谢谢您的夸奖。
t_en: Thank you. Thanks for the compliment.

t_ch: …桂、桂乃芬小姐，绥园还是很危险，这么多人、危、险……
t_en: ...M—Miss Guinaifen, Fyxestroll Garden is a really dangerous place, especially with so... many... people...

t_ch: 人好多，我、我开始有些晕了……
t_en: There're too many people. I'm starting to feel a little... dizzy...

t_ch: 姑娘，看直播的时候我就想问了，你这剑看着好重啊，是真剑假剑啊？
t_en: Young girl, while watching your stream, I kept wanting to ask — that sword always looks so heavy. Is it real, or fake?

t_ch: 当然是真的啦，这柄剑可是我娘给我的，我也是练了很久才勉强使得动。
t_en: Of course it's real~ My mama gave it to me, and I had to practice for an eternity before I could manage to lift it.

t_ch: 嚯，你这身手可真是绝了！
t_en: Wow, what incredible skill!

t_ch: 那个灰头发的……
t_en: That gray-haired person...

t_ch: 我看人家的感情状态不是说……
t_en: When I saw the relationship status, didn't it say...

t_ch: 提起球棒的时候好酷！
t_en: So cool with that pose while wielding a bat!

t_ch: 那是台本，一定不是真的！
t_en: It's a script, definitely fake!

t_ch: 你也多多和粉丝们交流嘛，这是我们一起取得的成就。
t_en: You should interact with the fans more. This is the fruit of our collective labor.

t_ch: 我很享受气氛，正考虑离开了…
t_en: I'm just basking in the ambience, and was thinking of leaving...

t_ch: 我明白，不过，我有些话想跟你说。
t_en: I understand, but I have something to tell you.

t_ch: 我还打算再感受下热烈的气氛…
t_en: I was planning to enjoy the bustling ambience a little longer...

t_ch: 没错，就应该这样。等你感受得差不多就来找我吧，我有话想跟你说。
t_en: That's right. This should be how it's done. Come look for me when you're done basking. I've got something to tell you.

t_ch: 来到仙舟之后，我做了各种各样的尝试，杂技、探店、主播，也包括我们捉鬼小队的各种探灵活动，我真的很幸福，尤其是这个账号达成的成就——
t_en: After coming to Xianzhou, I tried all sorts of things: Acrobatics, store visits, streaming, and the ghost-busting stuff with our ghost-hunting squad. I'm really blessed, especially with the milestones reached with this account...

t_ch: 之前的我想都不敢想！
t_en: The past me would have never dared to even dream of this!

t_ch: 早知道账号就叫「球棒侠」了…
t_en: On hindsight, this account should have been called Baseballer Hero...

t_ch: …我当时可没有考虑这么多，再说了，你现在也是「小桂子Guinevere」。
t_en: ...I wasn't really thinking that far back then. Besides, you're also "LilGuiGuinevere" right now.

t_ch: 你本来很有受欢迎的天赋…
t_en: You have a natural charisma that makes you popular...

t_ch: …我承认我是自带流量的，但是还得多亏了你们。
t_en: ...I admit that I come with my own fanbase, but it's also thanks to you all.

t_ch: 账号涨粉太快，有点虚假…
t_en: The account's fan count is rising so fast that it's a little fake...

t_ch: …其实我也有好几次这么想过，这说明「小桂子Guinevere」是真的火。
t_en: ...That's what I also thought before, but that's just proof of how "LilGuiGuinevere" is truly popular.

t_ch: 虽然这个账号名叫「小桂子Guinevere」，但是它并不是我。「小桂子Guinevere」承载着很多人对它的想象，早已不是某个具体的人了。
t_en: This account may be called "LilGuiGuinevere," but it's not mine alone. "LilGuiGuinevere" bears many people's expectations — it stopped being just one person a long time ago.

t_ch: 我做不到像「小桂子Guinevere」一样永远乐观阳光，我也做不到像「小桂子Guinevere」一样永远妙语连珠，受人追捧。
t_en: I can't always be an eternal ray of sunshine like "LilGuiGuinevere" is. I also can't always be "LilGuiGuinevere" with her razor-sharp wit and how she's adored by so many.

t_ch: 我一个人是做不到的，这都是有你，有捉鬼小队，有粉丝们的共同帮助才能完成的。所以我想再麻烦你一次，把我们的合照发在罗浮杂俎上。
t_en: I couldn't have done it alone — it was thanks to you, the ghost-hunting squad, and the unity of our fans that this was achieved. So I was thinking of troubling you once more — to post the photograph of all of us on Ghostly Grove.

t_ch: 真是拿你没办法。
t_en: Whatever shall I do with you.

t_ch: 让我发，我最擅长发了！
t_en: Let me post it! I'm the best at posting!

t_ch: 真是个难忘的夜晚，不是吗？我还打算再待一会。就让我再说最后一句吧——
t_en: A truly unforgettable night, no? I plan on staying a bit longer. Just let me say this one last line...

t_ch: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Thank you, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 有个帖子我很在意，你们帮我鉴定一下！
t_en: There's a post that's on my mind. Can you help me parse it out?

t_ch: …有什么好在意的，我来看看。
t_en: ...Nothing's worth worrying so much about. Let me take a look.

t_ch: 家人们，虽然直觉告诉我这是假的，但我还是很在意，去看看吗？
t_en: Hey fam, even though my intuitions tell me this is fake, I'm still a little worried about it. Wanna go check it out?

t_ch: 嗯，走吧，我也有点在意。
t_en: Yeah, let's go. I wanna know, too.

t_ch: 出发！
t_en: Let's go!

t_ch: 感谢家人们。
t_en: Thanks loads, fam.

t_ch: 根据发帖人提供的位置信息来看，是这里没错了。
t_en: This is the right place, based on the location mentioned in the post.

t_ch: 这里看起来挺正常的。
t_en: Looks pretty normal around here.

t_ch: 哪有什么「嘎吱响的空荡货仓」啊，这附近连个人影都没有。
t_en: Where's this "creaky old empty warehouse" then? There's not a soul around.

t_ch: 你们有发现什么吗？
t_en: You guys find anything yet?

t_ch: 我这里没发现有什么异常之处，看起来挺正常的，就是这附近有点…空旷？
t_en: Nothing special around here. It all seems pretty normal. It's just that everywhere around here just seems kinda... empty?

t_ch: 地址是对的，帖子里说的「货仓」到处都是，也算是对的上号。
t_en: The address is correct, and it's packed full of similar "warehouses" as mentioned in the post, so we've got the right place.

t_ch: 但网上的东西本来就有真有假，或许是发帖的存心骗我们，或许是风吹过货仓的门发出的声响被误认为是闹鬼，人家也不是有心骗人，谁知道呢。
t_en: But there're always problems with what's true and what's fake online. Maybe they're trying to scam us. Maybe a gust blew open the warehouse door, making it creak as though haunted — and they DON'T actually want to scam us. Who knows?

t_ch: 反正就算是白跑一趟也在我意料之中，我们也不必灰心，现在还早，回去休息休息也来得及。
t_en: In any case, it's well worth considering that this could even be a waste of a trip. We shouldn't lose heart, because it's still early — and there's still time to go back and take a rest.
Umm...

t_ch: 小桂子说的在理，不过…我方才就注意到，附近有个家伙老往我们这儿瞧……
t_en: Little Gui, that's reasonable enough, but... I've only just noticed, there's a girl just over there who keeps looking this way...

t_ch: 那个人…我也发现了，但我没感受到岁阳的气息，她应该只是个普通人。
t_en: That girl... I've noticed her too, but it doesn't feel like a heliobus inside. She should just be a normal person.

t_ch: 上去问问就知道了，流云渡平日里人不多，我们在这里东翻西找的惹人注目也很正常。
t_en: Just go and ask, you'll soon find out. The Cloudford is usually pretty quiet on weekdays, and we're out here ransacking the place. It's natural to attract a little attention.

t_ch: 呃，你们有什么事吗？
t_en: Um, what do you want?

t_ch: 你刚才是在盯着我们看吗？
t_en: Were you just staring at us?

t_ch: 我看有位小姑娘挺眼熟的…就是你、你是那个主播对吧，最近很火的那个什么小桂子来着？
t_en: One of you girls looks like someone I know... You, you there. Are you that famous vlogger who went viral recently? Little Gui, right?

t_ch: 正是在下，我是桂乃芬，感兴趣的话请到直播间里点个关注吧。
t_en: I am indeed. The name's Guinaifen and if you're keen, then don't forget to visit our page, like — and subscribe!

t_ch: 小桂子，不是让你说这个。
t_en: Little Gui, that's not what she meant.

t_ch: 咳咳，职业病了抱歉。我们在这儿随便逛逛，你呢？
t_en: Ahem, sorry. Call me a workaholic or something. We're just strolling around here. How about you?

t_ch: 噢，我、我啊，我就…我就随便转转——我有个物流信息更新，在附近取件呢。
t_en: Oh, I—I... I just... I'm just hanging out here... I've got a notification about a courier delivery and the pick-up spot is nearby.

t_ch: 原来如此，那就不打扰你了。
t_en: Is that right? In that case, we won't bother you any further.

t_ch: 这附近除了我们也没个人影，你一个人在外面还是多注意安全。
t_en: There's nobody else around besides us. Please take care with your personal safety when you're out on your own.

t_ch: 一切似乎并无异常，小队决定再观望片刻。
t_en: Everything seemed normal enough, so the squad decided to stay and watch a while longer.

t_ch: 又冒出来个新帖，而且这个用户名…这个风格……
t_en: There's another new post. And the username... and the style...

t_ch: 我感觉这个帖子和上次那个货仓的帖子很像，你们要来看看吗！
t_en: This post seems really similar to the previous warehouse one. Come have a look!

t_ch: …上次扑了个空，真的还要看吗？
t_en: ...I missed it last time. Do I still have to look?

t_ch: 我脑内的雷达铮铮作响，有一种特殊的直觉。
t_en: My internal radar is tingling and giving me a special feeling.

t_ch: 那我们就相信你的直觉，出发。
t_en: Well, we trust your instincts. Let's go.

t_ch: 出发！
t_en: Let's go!

t_ch: 走吧。
t_en: Let's go.

t_ch: …和帖子的内容又对不上……
t_en: ...This is different from that post...

t_ch: 素裳和藿藿还没到？
t_en: Sushang and Huohuo are still on their way?

t_ch: 我让她们去找其他人打听事情去了。
t_en: I sent them ahead to go find some other people and ask around about it.

t_ch: 好像没看到什么广告牌。
t_en: I don't think I've seen any billboards around.

t_ch: 看不到是正常的。
t_en: That's normal.

t_ch: 我在金人巷待了这么久，这里压根就没有什么「当铺」。
t_en: In all my time of hanging out around the Aurum Alley, I've never seen any "pawnshop" here.

t_ch: 也难怪我在附近转悠了半天，什么诡异之处都看不出来。那个帖子的所谓「爆料」，压根就是编出来的。
t_en: No wonder why I've been walking around all day but still haven't found anything weird. That so-called "scandal" from the post has got to be made up.

t_ch: 真倒霉，这次也扑空了…
t_en: Bad luck. I missed out this time, too...

t_ch: 不，这不是「倒霉」，依我看，这是有人在背后捣乱。
t_en: No, it's not "bad luck." In my estimation, this is someone causing trouble behind the scenes.

t_ch: 真闲啊，有空写点小说不好吗？
t_en: They must be bored. You know what? You should write novels.

t_ch: 毕竟只是捕风捉影而已。
t_en: It's just tilting at windmills, nothing more.

t_ch: 上次在流云渡我们扑空了一次，这次在金人巷又踩了一次坑。
t_en: We missed out last time at Cloudford, and this time we were hustled again at the Aurum Alley.

t_ch: 我觉得此事相当蹊跷，上回发帖的人叫「桂桂的咸辣豆汁」，这回发帖的叫「请桂桂喝冰糖豆汁」。
t_en: I find this all really weird. The user who posted up last time was GuiguiSpicySourJuice, and this post is by SweetBoba_4_SweetGui.

t_ch: 都很喜欢豆汁？
t_en: I guess they like juice?

t_ch: 很少有粉丝会这么喊我，而且…名字恰巧都是某种古怪口味的豆汁。
t_en: Hardly any fans call me that, plus... the usernames are all weird juicy names.

t_ch: 这俩其实是同一个人？
t_en: Do you think it's the same person?

t_ch: 我怀疑这俩应该是同一个人。现在已经证实两条帖文都是假消息，也就是说——这人是故意在捣乱爆假料。
t_en: I suspect they're from the same person. We've confirmed now that both posts are totally fake news. That means: This person is deliberately spreading disinformation.

t_ch: 至于这么做的目的…唔，不知对方究竟是何人，所以作案的动机可就千奇百怪了。但我想能做出这种事，大概率是我的黑粉……
t_en: As for their goal? Hmm... I don't know who they are, so the motives for doing this are all going to be strange. But I'm thinking, the kind of person who'd do this has to be one of my haters...

t_ch: 你认真聆听着桂乃芬的分析，不远处一道视线停留在你身上，你顿时察觉到了不对。
t_en: You listen carefully to Guinaifen's analysis when you feel sight lines locking on to you from not too far away. Instantly, you realize something is wrong.

t_ch: 小桂子，有人盯着我们了。
t_en: Little Gui, someone's watching us.

t_ch: 啊？有点可疑，先不要声张，你带路，我们直接冲过去问个清楚。
t_en: Huh? That's sus. Don't show our hand. You lead the way. Let's just rush over and ask what's going on.

t_ch: …等等，你看着挺眼熟的，我们是不是在哪里见过？
t_en: ...Hang on. You seem really familiar. Have we met?

t_ch: 上次在流云渡的就是她！
t_en: The girl in the Cloudford last time — it's her!

t_ch: 你为什么要跟踪我们？你好好回答，否则我会考虑到地衡司报警。
t_en: Why are you stalking us? Go on, tell us — otherwise I'll have to report you to the Realm-Keeping Commission.

t_ch: 桂桂你先别发火，我叫漫漫，刚才吓到你很不好意思，我也不是有意要害你的或者想怎么对付你，我只是……
t_en: Guigui, please don't be mad. I'm Manman and I'm sorry for scaring you just now. I didn't mean to hurt you or to do anything bad to you. I just...

t_ch: 「桂桂」？我知道了，你就是那个发帖人！你说你老编这些贴干嘛？
t_en: "Guigui"!? I knew it. You're the one who made those posts! What are you doing making posts like that?

t_ch: 我…其实我…我是你的粉丝，我见你在上面征集投稿什么的，还说会实地走访，我就想着会不会有机会见到你。
t_en: I... actually I... am one of your fans. I saw you were soliciting contributions and that you were making real life trips around, so I wondered if I might get a chance to try and meet you.

t_ch: 然后我就试了下…不得不说你真人就算发火也好可爱啊呜呜，你的脸比屏幕上小很多真的可爱死了。
t_en: And so I tried, but... I have to say, you're so cute in-person even when you're angry~ Your face is much smaller than on the screen. Just too cute.

t_ch: 我只是想亲眼见见你，没有别的意思…之前十万粉丝纪念问答活动，我还留言问过你会不会有粉丝见面会呢，可惜问题没被选中。
t_en: I just wanted to see you with my own eyes and really didn't mean anything else by it... During the hundred thousand fans event, I even submitted a question about whether you'd be doing any fan meet-and-greets — but sadly my question never got picked.

t_ch: 我真是服了，我还是第一次遇到这样的「粉丝」，在我家乡，小孩子都知道做人做事得遵守规则——等等，按仙舟上的规矩…你成年了吗？
t_en: I have no words. This is the first time I've ever met a "fan" like this. Back in my hometown, even little kids know there's a proper set of rules to follow when conducting oneself — hang on, based on the Xianzhou standards... are you a minor?

t_ch: 呃，还没呢…我还在上学。但是论年纪，我怎么都比你要大上不少。
t_en: Oh, yeah... I'm still in school. But in terms of age, I'm far older than you are.

t_ch: 未成年人追什么直播？
t_en: Minors shouldn't be following streamers!

t_ch: 就是，你还没成年呢，不好好读书还看什么直播？
t_en: Right? You're not yet an adult. Why are you watching streams when you should be studying?

t_ch: 看来得拜访下你的老师了…
t_en: Looks like I'll have to pay your teacher a visit...

t_ch: 嗯嗯，{NICKNAME}这建议不错。
t_en: Mmm-hmm, good idea {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 咳，我最害怕你这种未成年来看直播的了，隔三差五家里人来申请打赏退款，完事了我要倒赔一笔手续费，辛辛苦苦播几天等于白忙活了。
t_en: Ahem, minors watching my stream is what scares me the most. Every few days, I'll get their parents requesting a refund and I'll get stung with the processing fee, meaning all my hard work streaming amounts to nothing.

t_ch: 我家人从来没管过我花钱的事…他们肯定不会找你退款的，你放心。
t_en: My family, they've never cared about me spending money... They won't ask for any refund. You can count on that.

t_ch: 咳，这、这是退款的事吗？
t_en: Ahem, y—you think it's just about a refund?

t_ch: 你知不知道为了求证你随口编的灵异故事，咱们浪费了多少精力。
t_en: Do you know how much effort we put into proving whether these supernatural stories of yours were true or not?

t_ch: 害得我们广告都没空接！
t_en: We were so busy that we couldn't even accept any ads!

t_ch: 就是，团队行程都被你打乱了！
t_en: Yeah, our squad trip was all messed up by you!

t_ch: 我没想到给你们造成了麻烦…我、我只是想见见你。骗你们是我不对，我也只能用钱来弥补你们浪费掉的心血了，真的很抱歉……
t_en: I didn't expect to put you out like this... I—I just wanted to see you, that's all. I shouldn't have tricked you. All I can do is use this money of mine to make up for all your wasted efforts. I'm really sorry...

t_ch: 都说了这不是钱的事儿！再说你一个未成年人哪来的收入……
t_en: I told you, this isn't about the money! Also — as a minor, where DOES that income of yours even come from...?

t_ch: 你不会真以为我是那种头脑简单的傻丫头吧？拜托，那只是直播的人设好吗。真正的小桂子可没你想的这么和蔼可亲！
t_en: You don't really take me as such a ditzy idiot, do you? Puh-lease, that's just a persona I put on for the stream. The real Little Gui is nowhere near that kindhearted in real life!

t_ch: 好了，你没事就赶紧走吧，再不走我就叫人了。什么年纪，回去好好上课，别整烂活！
t_en: Alright, if there's nothing else, you can get outta here. And you'd better, otherwise I'll have to call someone. At your age, you should just be studying hard instead of messing around!
...*sniff* *sob*

t_ch: 漫漫捂着脸，一溜烟跑开了。
t_en: Manman wipes her face before vanishing like a puff of smoke.

t_ch: 对粉丝这么严厉，真的好吗？
t_en: Is it really wise to be so tough on your fans?

t_ch: 真的要这么得罪粉丝吗？
t_en: Do you really want to provoke your fanbase?

t_ch: 如果只是哄着她，恐怕她不会明白「小桂子」只是一份职业罢了，她会以为我真是个了不得的捉鬼专家，拿着父母辛苦挣来的钱一点也不心疼地打赏我。
t_en: If I just placate her, I'm afraid she won't understand that "Little Gui" is actually just a job for me. She'll think that I'm actually this amazing ghost-hunter and donate all of her parents' hard-earned money to me without a care.

t_ch: 谢谢你啊{NICKNAME}，多亏你全程在配合我，要不然……
t_en: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. We're lucky to have you helping out the whole way, otherwise...

t_ch: 不过今天这事算是个预警，倒是提醒我了，得敲打下粉丝，以后…以后还是要和粉丝保持距离才行。
t_en: Today's incident is a warning, anyway. It reminds me to knock down my fans a peg, otherwise... I'm going to have to keep a distance from my fans in the future.

t_ch: 好啦，今天又白跑一趟。咱们还是早点回去休息吧！
t_en: Alright, another waste of a trip today. Let's call it a day already and get some rest!

t_ch: 这是什么…咦，这是…哪位粉丝寄过来的礼物吗？
t_en: What's this... Huh? Is this... a gift from a fan?

t_ch: 等我拆一下看看里面是什么…啊…原来是她寄的！
t_en: Let's rip it open and see what's inside... Ahh... it's from her!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}！之前骗我们出来的那个小女孩啊，我那个未成年的粉丝记得吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}! Do you remember that girl who tricked us into coming out last time? That fan of mine who was still a minor?

t_ch: 记得记得，编故事骗你那个？
t_en: Yeah, I remember. The one who made up those stories to trick you — what about her?

t_ch: 对对对。
t_en: Yup yup yup.

t_ch: …没什么印象了。
t_en: ...No impression whatsoever.

t_ch: 这才多久啊你就忘了。
t_en: You've already forgotten so soon!?

t_ch: 之前我还特意发了条公告明里暗里在警告她。
t_en: I put out this special announcement before to act as a warning — both overt and covert — to her.

t_ch: 结果今天收到她让机巧鸟托运过来的礼物…她压根没生气，甚至还准备了礼物诶。
t_en: And what happens? Today I got a package delivery from a cycrane... She wasn't mad at all. She even got me a small gift.

t_ch: 没想到是这么好的结局…
t_en: I never expected things to wrap up so nice and neat...

t_ch: 要是我，我就粉转黑了。
t_en: If it were me, I'd turn into a hater.

t_ch: 里面也不是什么贵重物品，就是些小点心，还有一封信。她在信里说，觉得我上次跟她说话，很在乎工作，看上去超级强势。
t_en: There's nothing valuable inside, just some snacks and this letter. In it, she said that I seemed to really care about my work when we met last time, and that I was pretty intense.

t_ch: 她觉得这样的我不仅不算人设崩塌，甚至还更酷了，说什么显得很「专业」。
t_en: She thought that when I was like this, it didn't ruin my reputation but actually made me seem even cooler — that I looked more "professional."

t_ch: 真是搞不懂她…总之她是寄了些点心过来，你也分一些吧。
t_en: I really don't understand her... Anyway, she mailed over some snacks. Grab some, why dontcha.

t_ch: 我想想，我也得给她寄点儿什么，我先撤退了，回见。
t_en: I've been thinking, I really should send her something back. I'm gonna do that. See you later.

t_ch: 尊敬的用户小桂子Guinevere，请签收。
t_en: Ms. LilGuiGuinevere, could you please sign for this?

t_ch: 谢谢。
t_en: Thank you.

t_ch: …其实我不是小桂子。
t_en: ...Actually, I'm not Little Gui.

t_ch: 签收人已找你代收。
t_en: The recipient asked for you to sign it on behalf of her.

t_ch: 已签收。感谢使用鹤运物流服务。鹤运速递，啥都能寄。
t_en: There you go. Thank you for using Heron Express services. Heron Express — We Ship Whatever You Want.

t_ch: （看来，这就是我的了。）
t_en: (Looks like this is mine.)

t_ch: 我到了，什么事？
t_en: It's me. What happened?

t_ch: 太好了，看到{NICKNAME}你出现在空间站我就放心了。
t_en: Fantastic. What a relief to see you on the space station, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 很抱歉，作为防卫科的负责人，这原应是我的职责，却要麻烦你……
t_en: I'm sorry. As head of the Security Department, this should be my responsibility, but I have to trouble you...

t_ch: 别自责了，阿兰大哥！
t_en: Don't blame yourself, Brother Arlan!

t_ch: 呃…这个绰号…这是我们科的家伙在拿我打趣，在外人面前还是别这么喊我了。
t_en: Uh... that nickname... The guys in my department use it to make fun of me. Please don't say it around outsiders.

t_ch: 都这么熟了，还是别客套了。
t_en: We're all friends around here. No need to be so polite.

t_ch: 抱歉，那我就长话短说了。
t_en: Sorry, I'll cut to the chase, then.

t_ch: 最近有些许骚乱——三位天才齐聚空间站，小姐忙着接待，但部分科员却发现有几只小怪物在空间站里乱窜。
t_en: There's been quite a bit of mayhem recently — three of the geniuses were meeting up at the space station, and while Asta hosted them, some of the researchers discovered several little critters running amok throughout the station.

t_ch: 它们长得挺可爱的，有点像佩佩，但身上又有些糕点形状的外壳，浑身香喷喷的，看上去没什么危害。
t_en: They're pretty cute — kinda like Peppy? But they have these cake-shaped shells, smell delicious, and look completely harmless.

t_ch: 小姐派了界种科的科员去观测它们的习性，却发现这些可爱的小怪物并没有看上去这么简单……
t_en: Asta sent over some researchers from the Department of Ecology to observe their behaviors, only to discover that these cute critters were nowhere near as simple as they seemed...

t_ch: 我感觉它们无毒无公害啊…
t_en: I feel like they're totally harmless...

t_ch: 嗯，它们是挺可爱的，能和其他智慧生命正常相处，也没什么攻击性。
t_en: Yeah, they're pretty cute and get along with other intelligent beings without any hostility at all.

t_ch: …它们也有隐藏实力？
t_en: ...Do they have hidden sides, too?

t_ch: 呃，身体器官…它们倒是一直没遮掩过，算不上什么隐藏实力。
t_en: Er, well their organs...? They have never really been covered up before, so there's nothing really hidden about it.

t_ch: 科员们发现，它们的面部与脚掌上有一些腺体，会释放自己的气味信号。
t_en: Our researchers discovered some glands on their face and foot soles that trigger olfactory signals.

t_ch: 腺体所释放出的化学物质，在与鼻腔内的嗅觉细胞结合后，可能会刺激到大脑……
t_en: The chemicals released from these glands combine with olfactory cells in the nose to potentially stimulate a reaction from the brain...

t_ch: …简单来说就是它们身上所散发的「食物香味」，会影响人类的感知，比如说——
t_en: ...Basically, the "food flavors" they radiate can affect human perception. For example...

t_ch: 此前有科员和它们接触过，闻到了「豆沙」香味的科员在回到休眠舱后变得郁郁寡欢，闻到了「芝士」香味的科员则极为亢奋。
t_en: Some researchers came into contact with them before. Those who smelled red bean felt depressed when they got back to their cryosleep pods. Meanwhile, those who could smell cheese grew extremely excited.

t_ch: 所以科员们针对「小怪物」的腺体，制作了一项专项测试，旨在计算出所有潜在风险。
t_en: So the researchers put together a special test for these critters' glands to calculate all of the potential risks.

t_ch: 可以说重点吗？
t_en: Can you get to the point?

t_ch: 抱歉，是我方才太激动了，说了半天没说到正事上。是这样的，我想拜托你来参加这个专项测试。
t_en: Sorry, I got carried away just now and kept beating around the bush. Okay, here's the thing: I would like you to take this special gland test.

t_ch: 所以你要我怎么帮你？
t_en: So how do you want me to help?

t_ch: 很简单，我想你来参加专项测试。
t_en: Easy: I'd like you to take the special gland test.

t_ch: 这项测试，简单来说就是把我们的思维同步上传到云端——
t_en: In a nutshell, this test uploads and synchronizes our thoughts to the cloud...

t_ch: 科员们尽可能多地收集到了「小怪物」们所分泌的气味，他们在云端上操纵特定的气味分子，将这些味道一一模拟了出来。
t_en: Our researchers then gather as much of these smell secretions from the critters, and then simulate each of these smells in the cloud by manipulating specific molecules.

t_ch: 通过激活不同的味道插件，测试者的感知会发生变化，大脑的回忆区域会激活，见到各种惊险的幻象……
t_en: Activating different scent plug-ins will change the test subject's perceptions, activating the memory domains of the brain and causing various thrilling hallucinations to be experienced...

t_ch: 呃，主要内容其实是模拟战斗，维修科的人说，以机器的性能，就只能支撑这种体量的内容。
t_en: Er, the main format is actually a simulated battle. The maintenance team said that a machine with these specs could only support content of that size.

t_ch: 很遗憾，我见识有限，测试结果大家都不太满意。维修科的人说，没把机器给折腾到冒烟，就说明我还没测试出风险阈值。
t_en: Unfortunately, my knowledge is limited and people haven't been happy with the test results. The maintenance team said I hadn't reached the risk threshold for testing until I had smoke pluming out of the machine.

t_ch: 我想，{NICKNAME}你是无名客，见多识广，身手也了得…你来试试，或许能达到他们想要的极限……
t_en: I think as a Nameless, {NICKNAME}, you've seen a lot, and you're pretty skilled too... Come give it a try and see if maybe you can reach these limits that they're after...

t_ch: 机器冒烟，我的脑子会不会也…
t_en: If there's smoke coming out of the machine, will my brain also...

t_ch: 你是担心身体受损吗？放心，只是远程连接，不会有直接接触的。
t_en: Are you worried about getting injured? Fear not, it's a remote connection, so there's no physical contact.

t_ch: 你可以去找其他无名客呀。
t_en: Go find another Nameless.

t_ch: 抱歉，{NICKNAME}，我知道你也很忙。但其他无名客…事发突然，我就第一时间来联系你了。
t_en: Sorry, {NICKNAME}. I know you're busy, but another Nameless... Everything happened so quickly that I just called you as soon as I could.

t_ch: 放心吧，测试程序装载在小机器人上了，你所见到的一切都是人工模拟的幻象。
t_en: Don't worry. The test is loaded onto a little robot and everything you see is an artificial simulation.

t_ch: 要是有什么意外，云端机器人会直接关闭电源强制退出，不会对你的身体造成任何负担。
t_en: If there's any surprise, the Cloudbot will shut down power and force exit without causing any strain on your body.

t_ch: 机器人就在医疗室里，我带你过去，测试的事情你问它就好了。
t_en: The robot's over in the clinic. I'll take you over. If you have any questions about the test, just ask away.

t_ch: 那么，专项测试的事就拜托你了，{NICKNAME}……
t_en: Alright then, I'll leave the test to you then, {NICKNAME}...

t_ch: 正在识别身份…认证中，认证已通过。
t_en: Verifying identity... Authenticating. Authentication successful.

t_ch: 休眠舱状态检测完成，云端同步成功。
t_en: Cryosleep pod status test complete. Cloud synchronization successful.

t_ch: 尊敬的特邀测试员，欢迎您参加「未知生命体嗅觉诱导的感知与幻觉专项测试」。请注意，测试数据由界种科独家提供，切勿外传。
t_en: Dear Special Test Candidate: Welcome to our Unknown Lifeform Smell-Induced Perceptions and Hallucinations Special Test. Please note, this test data has been provided exclusively by the Department of Ecology and may not be shared externally.

t_ch: 休眠舱已连接——
t_en: Cryosleep pod connected...

t_ch: 如需开启测试，请躺在旁边的休眠舱上，正面朝上平躺，保持心境平和。
t_en: To start the test, please lie down face up in the cryosleep pod next to you and maintain a calm mental state.

t_ch: 正在识别身份…认证中，认证已通过。
t_en: Verifying identity... Authenticating. Authentication successful.

t_ch: 尊敬的特邀测试员，诚邀您参与本次调研，我们期待您的反馈与建议。
t_en: Dear Special Test Candidate: We warmly invite you to participate in our survey and look forward to your suggestions and feedback.

t_ch: 请问您感觉如何？
t_en: How did you find it?

t_ch: 非常简单。
t_en: Very easy.

t_ch: 打完了，就这？
t_en: All done. Is that it?

t_ch: 您的反馈已记录，后台数据已传输完毕。检测到更新内容，「知觉难度提升版界种科最新难度惊天地泣星神科员看了无比绝望模式扩充包」已安装成功。
t_en: Your feedback has been recorded and saved. New update detected: "Perceptual Difficulty Enhanced Edition: Department of Ecology's New Hard Mode Heaven-Shattering Aeon-Shuddering Researchers-Shall-Gaze-Upon-This-And-Despair Mode Expansion" has been successfully installed.

t_ch: 程序已更新，是否加载「绝望模式」，测试更多关卡？
t_en: Program updated. Would you like to load Despair Mode and test more stages?

t_ch: 那就测一下吧。
t_en: Let's test!

t_ch: 休眠舱已连接——
t_en: Cryosleep pod connected...

t_ch: 请开启休眠舱，正面朝上平躺，保持心境平和。
t_en: Please open up the cryosleep pod and lie down face up. Maintain a calm mood.

t_ch: 我还没准备好。
t_en: I'm not ready yet.

t_ch: 感谢您使用思维云端参与专项测试，再会！
t_en: Thank you for using Idea Cloud to complete this test. Goodbye!

t_ch: 没关系，休眠舱已就绪，如果您想要继续测试，随时启动休眠舱即可。
t_en: No problem. The cryosleep pod is Ready. You can restart the cryosleep pod at any time if you would like to continue with the test.

t_ch: 尊敬的特邀测试员，感谢您使用思维云端，专项测试已结束。
t_en: Dear Special Test Candidate: Thank you for using Idea Cloud. The test is now complete.

t_ch: 再会！
t_en: Goodbye!

t_ch: 尊敬的特邀测试员，您参与的「未知生命体嗅觉诱导的感知与幻觉专项测试」尚未完成，休眠舱连接畅通。
t_en: Dear Special Test Candidate: Your [Unknown Lifeform Smell-Induced Perceptions and Hallucinations Special Test] has not been completed. Cryosleep pod connection is still linked.

t_ch: 如需开启测试，请躺在旁边的休眠舱上，正面朝上平躺，保持心境平和。
t_en: To start the test, please lie down face up in the cryosleep pod next to you and maintain a calm mental state.

t_ch: 你好，我是照料阮•梅女士造物的保姆机器人，很高兴为你服务。
t_en: Hello! I am the Helper Robot who looks after Madam Ruan Mei's creations. It is a pleasure to serve.

t_ch: 在正式开启培育工作前，请容许我先为你讲解相关内容。
t_en: Before we begin with the nurturing, please allow me to explain the process.

t_ch: 快进入正题吧！
t_en: Let's get to it!

t_ch: 怎么培育？
t_en: Nurturing how?

t_ch: 空间站正在解析造物们的基因谱系，由于样本量不足，我们需要培育出更多的造物。
t_en: The space station is analyzing the genetic components of the creations, and we must nurture more creations due to an insufficient sample size.

t_ch: 两只亲代造物已准备就绪，通过这台「生命烘焙箱」就能不断制造出新的造物。
t_en: The two parental creations are ready. We use this Lifeform Oven to keep nurturing new creations.

t_ch: 造物们都有着不同的基因，能展现出不同的特征，请注意——每培育出一只新的造物，每发现一种新的特征，对我们的研究都大有裨益。
t_en: Creations all have different genes and can express different traits. Please note that every time a new creation is nurtured, or a new trait is discovered, it will bring great benefit to our research.

t_ch: 现在，艾丝妲站长的远程通讯已连接，接下来请你开启「生命烘焙箱」——
t_en: Lead Researcher Asta's remote messenger is now online. Can you please turn the Lifeform Oven on...

t_ch: 刚培育出的造物蜷缩在机器人身旁，仔细打量着你。
t_en: The newly-nurtured creation huddles up next to the chassis of the robot, carefully sizing you up.

t_ch: 它「嗖」地一下窜了出去，你连它的尾巴是什么花色的都没看清。
t_en: It whizzes out before you're even able to see what color its tail is.

t_ch: …它才出生没多久，可能还没习惯这里的生活。
t_en: ...It only just spawned not long ago, so it may not be used to life here yet.

t_ch: 不知道它窜哪儿去了，外面不太安全，{NICKNAME}，麻烦你去找找它吧。
t_en: I don't know where it scuttled off to. It's not safe to go outside — {NICKNAME}, can you please find it?

t_ch: 我已看到你的成果，新生带来希望，你果然如螺丝咕姆先生所说，是培育造物的最佳人选。
t_en: I've seen your results. With new life brings new hope. As Screwllum said, you are the best at nurturing new creations.

t_ch: 方才的培育还顺利吧？有需要帮忙的地方吗？
t_en: Did the nurturing go well? Do you need any help?

t_ch: （向它转述刚才的事）
t_en: (Recount the recent events to it)

t_ch: 原来如此，我明白了，是我考虑不周——我没想到刚诞生的造物这么快就拥有自主意识。
t_en: Ah, I see. Insufficient consideration has been given — I didn't expect the new creation to develop sentience so soon.

t_ch: 它竟然能迅速搞清楚自己的需求是什么，这哪怕在空间站里也不常见…呃，抱歉，我不是有意批评空间站的工作人员，他们都是很努力的人类。
t_en: It's actually capable of quickly figuring out its needs, which is rare even among the entire space station... Um, I'm sorry. I don't mean to criticize the hard-working humans aboard the space station.

t_ch: 根据过往经验，造物们不介意被塞进背包里，但从长远考量，它们需要睡眠用品。
t_en: Based on past experiences, creations don't mind being carried in a backpack, but they will need sleeping supplies in the long run.

t_ch: 艾丝妲站长前不久为造物们购置了一批睡眠用品，她把这称为「猫窝」，当时有不少空闲猫窝被闲置了。
t_en: Lead Researcher Asta bought some sleeping supplies for the creations. She calls this a "Kitty Cot." There were lots of empty cat beds lying around unused at the time.

t_ch: 这批物资就在附近，正在呼叫物流机器人，稍等——
t_en: These supplies are nearby. I will arrange for a delivery robot to bring that over. One moment...

t_ch: 睡眠用品已送到，现在你可以试试，将你培育出来的造物安置在上面？
t_en: The sleeping supplies are here. Perhaps now you can try accommodating the creation you nurtured on them?

t_ch: 你认出了这只造物，就是方才窜出去的那一只。
t_en: You recognize this creation as the one that just scuttled away.

t_ch: 它伸出爪子扒拉着地上的垃圾，正要吞咽。你想阻止，却为时已晚——
t_en: It reaches out with its paw toward the trash on the ground, and is about to swallow it. You want to stop it, but it's already too late...

t_ch: 它将垃圾吞了下去，随即浑身颤抖了起来，身躯不断变幻……
t_en: It swallows the trash, then begins to tremble all over as its body starts changing uncontrollably...
Meow...

t_ch: 你这是变身了？
t_en: Are you transforming!?

t_ch: …你捡垃圾吃？
t_en: ...Did you just eat a piece of trash?

t_ch: 喵？
t_en: Meow?

t_ch: （把它带回去）
t_en: (Bring it back)

t_ch: 它的样子发生了很大变化，但它自己也说不清究竟是怎么回事。
t_en: Its appearance has altered, but it doesn't seem to have an explanation either.

t_ch: 你决定把它先带回保姆机器人处，或许它会知道点什么。
t_en: You decide to take it back to the Helper Robot — perhaps it will have an idea.

t_ch: 这是怎么回事？
t_en: What's going on?

t_ch: （向它讲述刚才的事）
t_en: (Recount what just happened)

t_ch: 根据你所描述的情况，我初步猜测为它在吞下垃圾后，发生了「变异」。
t_en: Based on what you have just described, my initial hypothesis is that it has mutated after consuming the trash.

t_ch: 变异发生后，身体特征也随之改变。
t_en: The mutation then changed the creation's physical traits.

t_ch: 对于这一原理，目前还不能明确，但我们可以尝试能否还原出近似情况。
t_en: This hypothesis is not yet confirmed, but we can try to see if we can approximate the situation.

t_ch: 相关情况我已上报给艾丝妲站长，远程通讯已连接，接下来请开启「生命烘焙箱」，我们要进行一次大胆的试验——
t_en: I have reported the details to Lead Researcher Asta, and a remote connection is now established. Please turn on the Lifeform Oven. We are going to try a few things out...

t_ch: 你成功地培育出了一批新的造物，这批造物身上的特征极为独特。
t_en: You have successfully nurtured a new batch of creations. The traits of this batch are extremely unique.

t_ch: 你好奇它们身上的特殊之处究竟从何而来。
t_en: You can't help but wonder where these special traits are actually coming from.

t_ch: 界种科最新调查报告已下载，读取中，请稍后……
t_en: The Department of Ecology's latest research has been downloaded. Loading... please wait...

t_ch: 它们头顶上究竟是什么？
t_en: What's that on top of their heads?

t_ch: 那是它的器官，你可以理解为身体自带的「帽子」。
t_en: That is their sensory organ. Think of it as a "hat" that comes with them.

t_ch: 为什么吃垃圾能变异？
t_en: How come eating trash leads to mutations?

t_ch: 因为它头戴「垃圾桶」。
t_en: Because it wears a "trashcan" on its head.

t_ch: 抱歉，这个笑话似乎并不好笑，我还没完全掌握人类深奥的语言规则。
t_en: I'm sorry, that joke wasn't particularly funny. I have yet to fully master the esoteric rules of human language.

t_ch: 我见过一些造物，身躯特征和大部分造物明显不同。它们游离在各个角落，你要是有机会，说不定能碰到它们。
t_en: I have seen some creations whose physical traits greatly differ from most of the others. They drift around all over the place. If you get the chance, you might just run into one of them.

t_ch: 如果你能将它们带到我这儿来，那就更好了。有足够的样本，就能破译它们身体特征的秘密。
t_en: It would be very good if you could bring them to me. With sufficient samples, the secrets of their physical traits can be decoded.

t_ch: 变异的原理是什么？
t_en: What is the principle behind the mutations?

t_ch: 很抱歉，这点我们也不是很清楚。不过界种科送了两只特别的造物过来，你可以利用它们进行培育实验。
t_en: I'm sorry, this is not well understood. However, the Department of Ecology has sent two creation species that you can use for nurturing research.

t_ch: 接下来，请继续培育造物，这将加快我们的研究进度。您所追寻的问题，届时会有科学的解答。
t_en: Next, please keep nurturing creations to help speed up our research progress. The answers to all the questions you seek can be found through science.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你来得正好，艾丝妲站长前不久为造物们购置了一批睡眠用品，她把这称为「猫窝」。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, how timely! Lead Researcher Asta has bought some sleeping supplies for the creations. She calls this a "Kitty Cot."

t_ch: 相关用品已清点完毕，现在你可以试试，将培育出来的造物安置好。
t_en: Relevant items have all been cataloged. Perhaps you can try using them to accommodate the creations you've nurtured?

t_ch: 咻咻！
t_en: Swoosh swoosh!

t_ch: 嘟啦啦，这个好好玩哦！
t_en: Bwa ha ha! This is so fun!

t_ch: 你想来一起玩吗？
t_en: Wanna play?

t_ch: 不必了。
t_en: No, thank you.

t_ch: 谢谢，你们自己玩吧。
t_en: Thanks — you guys have fun without me.

t_ch: 好哦！
t_en: Alright!

t_ch: 你观察着自己的「最新成果」，可你的「成果们」正不知道从哪个角落翻出来些垃圾，丝毫不嫌脏地把玩着。
t_en: Observing your "latest achievements," you find them digging around in the trash — as though your "achievements" do not care in the slightest about playing in filth.

t_ch: 它们玩得很开心，以至于完全不把在场的其他人放在眼里。遍地是垃圾，你看见有造物不满地皱起了眉头。
t_en: They were having so much fun that they completely ignored everyone else present. Trash was scattered everywhere, and you could see some creations frowning disapprovingly at the mess.

t_ch: （赶紧跟保姆机器人说下，让它清理下这里吧。）
t_en: (Hurry over to the Helper Robot and get it to clean up in here.)

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，多亏了你，最近冒出一大批造物，这里也热闹了不少。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, thanks to your efforts, many batches of creations have spawned. It's getting lively around here.

t_ch: （让它帮忙打扫干净）
t_en: (Ask it to help clean up)

t_ch: （转述刚才发生的事）
t_en: (Tell it what just happened)

t_ch: 这样啊，毕竟是新生造物，心智还不够成熟。
t_en: I see. Well, they are still young, their minds not yet fully developed.

t_ch: 但你的顾虑也很合理，就算每天打扫，这种事还是会不断发生……
t_en: But these concerns of yours are also reasonable. Even if cleaning is performed daily, similar things will keep happening...

t_ch: 这样一来，它们是玩尽兴了，可其他造物就很难受了。
t_en: They have plenty of fun like this, but other creations will suffer.

t_ch: 实在不行就送养吧。
t_en: If it doesn't work out, they can always be put up for adoption.

t_ch: 那可不行。况且，就算你送养了它们，其他造物在场，难免会有类似的情况发生。
t_en: That won't work. Even if we put them up for adoption, similar situations will keep happening with other creations.

t_ch: 到时候，难道你要将所有造物都送走吗？
t_en: When the time comes, are you going to try and give away all the creations?

t_ch: 或许可以给它们个教训？
t_en: Maybe we can teach them a lesson?

t_ch: 不不不，这样可不好。
t_en: No, please don't. This is not good.

t_ch: 既然造物之间的需求不同，有的喜欢玩乐，有的喜欢清净，有的比较邋遢，有的爱干净……
t_en: Different creations have different needs: Some like to have fun, some like to be quiet, some are sloppy, and some are germaphobes...

t_ch: 我们可以改造这个舱段，给它们做好功能分区，让它们的需求最大程度地得到满足。
t_en: We can modify this zone and divide them by function to try and meet their needs to the greatest extent possible.

t_ch: 那我们该怎么做呢？
t_en: Then what should we do?

t_ch: 很简单，做好功能分区就行。
t_en: Simple: Separate them according to their functionality.

t_ch: 意思是要装修吗？
t_en: Are you talking about renovating?

t_ch: 概念上有点像，但实际没有这么多工序。
t_en: It's a similar concept, but it won't be as complicated in practice.

t_ch: 我估算了下，最基础的需求是进食和休息，我们有现成的资源，完全可以找两个不同的区域，按功能做好划分。
t_en: I have run some estimations. Their most basic needs are food and rest, and we have supplies on hand. It is wholly possible to create two separate areas based on that alone, and divide them according to their functions.

t_ch: 在进食区的就只管吃吃吃，吃完了可以稍微在附近玩会儿，反正大家都在吃饭也不会介意。
t_en: In the Dining Area, they just indulge in their meals. After eating, they can play nearby — everyone's eating, anyway, so they won't care.

t_ch: 在休息区的就要保持安静，刚刚在进食区吃饱了的，玩累了的，可以直接过来呼呼大睡。
t_en: Those in the Rest Area should be keeping quiet. Those who are done eating in the Dining Area or who have worn themselves out playing can come here for a good sleep.

t_ch: 这样的话…它们之间就能减少分歧与摩擦。你只需要教会它们使用不同功能分区就行。
t_en: This way... any differences or friction between them can be gradually reduced. You just need to teach them how to use the different areas.

t_ch: 得手动将它们提进去？
t_en: Do we have to move them around manually?

t_ch: 要给它们上课吗？
t_en: Should we teach them about all this?

t_ch: 造物之间的智力水平层次不齐，我们得想一个周全的方法……
t_en: The intelligence levels among creations vary. We need to come up with a comprehensive approach...

t_ch: 图像是最简明易懂的东西，可以在不同分区的地面上喷漆，喷涂上对应的功能涂鸦，这样就不会搞混了。
t_en: Images are the easiest way to get meaning across. You can spray a mark on the ground in the different areas, with graffiti of what the area is for to alleviate any confusion.

t_ch: 不过……
t_en: But...

t_ch: 保姆机器人尴尬地看了看你。
t_en: The Helper Robot awkwardly looks at you.

t_ch: 很抱歉，我悬浮的高度是固定的，无法下降…所以……
t_en: I'm sorry, but my levitation height is fixed and cannot be lowered... so...

t_ch: 别废话了，我来吧！
t_en: Fine, I'll do it!

t_ch: 这种事就交给我吧！
t_en: Leave it to me!

t_ch: 好的，那就麻烦你了，喷漆装置已为你安装完毕。在喷涂好后可以把造物们安置在对应区域。
t_en: Then I'll leave it to you. The spray device has been installed. Once you've finished the spraying, you can accommodate the creations in the corresponding areas.

t_ch: 还有，请不要喷错位置！这可能会为其他机器人带来不必要的负担。
t_en: And please don't spray in the wrong place! This may cause unnecessary trouble for other robots.

t_ch: 它们很高兴，彼此之间相处得也很愉快。多亏了你啊，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: They're happy and are getting on very well with each other. All thanks to you, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 那是，都是我的功劳。
t_en: Sure is. The credit's all mine.

t_ch: 你比我见过的大部分人类更直率，我很欣赏你这一点。
t_en: You're more straightforward than most humans I've ever met. I really appreciate that.

t_ch: 应该的，分内之事。
t_en: It's my duty.

t_ch: 你太谦虚了，你做得比所有人预想的都更出色。
t_en: You are so humble, and you always manage to exceed everyone's expectations.

t_ch: 舱段分区改造已初见成果，有个好消息要告诉你，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: The rezoning work appears to be yielding results. I have some good news to tell you, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 艾丝妲要给我发奖金？
t_en: Asta is giving me a bonus?

t_ch: 这…不是，不过她会不会这么奖励你，我也不清楚。
t_en: That's... not it. I'm not sure if she would reward you for this.

t_ch: 你就直说吧。
t_en: Go on, say it.

t_ch: 好。
t_en: Alright.

t_ch: 螺丝咕姆先生为我远程升级了系统，我现在的看管范围扩大了，你可以把它们托管在我这儿了。
t_en: Screwllum recently upgraded my remote systems, and my operational scope has been expanded. You can leave them with me.

t_ch: 我会定时给你发送监控报告的，你可以放心去研究培育配方，培育更多造物了。
t_en: I will send you regular reports so you can rest easy, work on the nurture recipe, and nurture more creations.

t_ch: 说了半天还是要培育……
t_en: After all that, it's still just more about nurturing...

t_ch: 还要培育造物？
t_en: Are there more creations to nurture?

t_ch: 研究进度的事情由艾丝妲站长负责。你可以随时打开培育手册查看进度，她承诺过会在那上面同步更新。
t_en: Lead Researcher Asta is in charge of the research progress. You can open the nurturing manual to check the progress at any time, she promised to keep updates in there.

t_ch: （「生命烘焙箱」就在附近，此处通风良好，还有现成的桌椅……）
t_en: (The Lifeform Oven is nearby, there's good ventilation in here, and there's a table with chairs all set up...)

t_ch: （该给这个区域设置什么功能分区好呢？）
t_en: (What function should we designate for this area?)

t_ch: …呜哇，你的心比这地板还冷！
t_en: ...Waah! Your heart is even colder than this floor!

t_ch: 这里硬邦邦的，怎么睡哦……
t_en: This is so hard, how am I supposed to sleep...

t_ch: 造物们拒绝在冰冷的金属表面上睡觉，它们大声抗议，吵得你脑袋疼。
t_en: The creations refuse to sleep on the cold metal floor and protest loudly. You start to get a headache.

t_ch: （呃，糟糕，好像喷错了…还是赶紧改回来吧。）
t_en: (Er, drat... I think that's the wrong symbol... Better change it back, quick.)

t_ch: 看起来还蛮方便的，吃完就能直接去……
t_en: That looks really convenient. I can eat and then just go over...

t_ch: 倒胃口……
t_en: My appetite's spoiled now...

t_ch: 造物们拒绝在此处进食，并对你的行为表示鄙夷。
t_en: The creations refuse to eat here, and are disgusted by your behavior.

t_ch: （呃，糟糕，好像喷错了…还是赶紧改回来吧。）
t_en: (Er, drat... I think that's the wrong symbol... Better change it back, quick.)

t_ch: 咔咔！开饭咯，我狂吃！
t_en: Ka-caw! Time to eat. I'm pigging out!

t_ch: 喵？你的头太大啦，退一下啊，我也要吃……
t_en: Meow? Your head is too big. Please step back, I want a bite too...

t_ch: 造物们大口咀嚼着食物，闹哄哄地对你表示了感谢。
t_en: The creations hungrily chomp down the food, raucously thanking you.

t_ch: （这个区域光照充足，还有舒服的抱枕……）
t_en: (This area has plenty of light, and comfy cushions...)

t_ch: （该给这个区域设置什么功能分区好呢？）
t_en: (What function should we designate for this area?)

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你来啦！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you're here!

t_ch: 最近有什么神奇的事吗？
t_en: Anything wondrous happened lately?

t_ch: 「惊喜」在哪儿？
t_en: Where's the "surprise"?
Well...

t_ch: 保姆机器人示意你看向它身边的造物伙伴。
t_en: The Helper Robot gestures for you to look at the creation by its side.

t_ch: 真没眼力劲，我这么耀眼你都没发现？
t_en: Are you blind? Haven't you noticed how splendidly magnificent I am?

t_ch: 你是？
t_en: And you are?

t_ch: 根据空间站界种科的命名规则，你可以喊我藤萝饼，能遗传到我这一类基因特征的幸运儿，都可以叫这个名字。
t_en: If we follow the Station Department of Ecology rules of nomenclature, then you can call me Wisteria Cake. Anything lucky enough to inherit these quality genetic traits can be called that, too.

t_ch: 你长得像黑塔…
t_en: You look like Herta...

t_ch: 你不是第一个这么说的。
t_en: You're not the first one to say that.

t_ch: 它是第一个主动要求见你的「阮•梅」造物。
t_en: It is the first creation of Ruan Mei's that's asked to see you.

t_ch: 我想看看，传说中的{NICKNAME}，究竟是何方神圣。
t_en: Let me see this legendary {NICKNAME} then — show me what in holy heck people see.

t_ch: 现在你见到了。
t_en: Take a good look.

t_ch: 嗯哼，长得挺高的，还行吧。
t_en: Hmm, pretty tall. Nice.

t_ch: 就为了来见我一面？
t_en: You came just to see me?

t_ch: 当然不是。
t_en: Of course, I didn't.

t_ch: 我这次来，目的并不只是为了见你。
t_en: I didn't just come to see you.

t_ch: 我在研究自己的身世——我的起源，我的种族，我的基因，诸如此类，有大量的领域目前尚处于空白状态。
t_en: I'm researching my origin story — my background, my race, my genes, all of that stuff. Most of it is still blank to me.

t_ch: 很可惜，即便以我这聪敏的脑袋，还是得不到想要的答案。我的研究遇到了瓶颈，现在，我需要你的帮助。
t_en: Unfortunately, even with this brain of mine I still can't get the answer I'm looking for. My research has hit a bottleneck, and now I need your help.

t_ch: 什么瓶颈？
t_en: What bottleneck?

t_ch: 科研的事我不懂啊。
t_en: I know nothing about science.

t_ch: 别急，听我说完，免得你一知半解的还拖累了我的研究。
t_en: Don't worry, just listen to this, so your ignorance doesn't impede my research.

t_ch: 在我开始介绍我伟大的研究之前，我要先给你介绍我的朋友——
t_en: Before I inform you about my mighty research project, I'd like to introduce you to a friend...

t_ch: 藤萝饼将同伴带到你面前。
t_en: Wisteria Cake brings over a companion to you.

t_ch: 你好，我只是应邀而来，你不必在意。
t_en: Hello. I'm just here by invite. Don't mind me.

t_ch: …「阮•梅」女士为什么要创造你…呜呜，这不公平。
t_en: ...Why did Miss Ruan Mei create you? *sniffle* This is not fair.
Uhh...

t_ch: 你闭嘴，一个骗子还这么招摇，以后不许这么对我的朋友讲话。
t_en: Shut up, you're such a scammer, acting all high and mighty. Don't ever talk to my friend like that again.

t_ch: 好了，看到我的朋友——那个招摇撞骗主动倒贴过来的家伙不算，你是不是觉得很惊讶？
t_en: Alright, apart from this arrogant friend of mine who won't quit stalking me — don't you feel surprised?

t_ch: 长得…有点眼熟。
t_en: Looks... a little familiar.

t_ch: 很像我认识的人。
t_en: Looks like someone I know.

t_ch: 我和她的特征极为独特，这是基因突变造成的，可为何我们会与你所认识的人如此相似，我暂时还没找到原因。
t_en: She and I have very similar traits, which were caused by genetic mutations. But I have no idea as to why I might look like some of these other people you know.

t_ch: 但我想，这和你脱不开关系，你觉得呢，{NICKNAME}？
t_en: But I think it all has something to do with you. Isn't that right, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 我不知道。
t_en: I don't know.

t_ch: 别碰瓷，这和我无关。
t_en: Don't drag me into this.

t_ch: 我怀疑这是受到某种精神层面的影响……
t_en: I suspect this is all connected on some kind of spiritual level...

t_ch: 但我的研究实例太少了，所以想请你帮我个忙，能不能帮我培育出更多具有稀有特征的造物。
t_en: But I have far too few samples to research, so that's why I'd like to ask for your help in nurturing more creations with a few more rare traits.

t_ch: 你要是实在培育不出来，那就多培育点普通造物，样本够大的话，也能凑合用。
t_en: If you really can't manage that, then nurture some more ordinary creations. I can get by, so long as I have enough samples.

t_ch: 空间站的课题和你的研究方向一模一样。
t_en: Your research topic is exactly the same as that of the space station.

t_ch: 所以，{NICKNAME}，你能不能想想办法，看看怎么培育出这些稀有造物，空间站的研究就差这最后一块拼图了。
t_en: So, {NICKNAME}, can you think of a way to nurture these rare creations? This is the last piece of the puzzle remaining for the space station's research program.

t_ch: 我试试吧。
t_en: Lemme try.

t_ch: 我相信你一定行。
t_en: I believe in you.

t_ch: 你不说话，那就当你同意咯？
t_en: If you don't reply, should I take that as agreement?

t_ch: 既然咱们目标一致，那正好，我有些东西要给你，或许会对你的培育工作有帮助。
t_en: It's fine since our goals are aligned. I have some things for you that you might find helpful with your nurturing job.

t_ch: 集合完毕，开始拍照
t_en: All together now. Time to take some photos.

t_ch: 询问现况
t_en: Ask about its situation

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，感谢你连日来的辛勤贡献。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, thank you for all your hard work over the past few days.

t_ch: 空间站的研究基本完成了，不过，还有最后一件事想麻烦你……
t_en: The space station's research has basically been completed. However, there's one last thing I'd like to task you with...

t_ch: 什么事？
t_en: What is it?

t_ch: 放心吧，这事很简单。
t_en: Don't worry, this is really easy.

t_ch: 说好最后一件了啊。
t_en: One last thing, then.

t_ch: 嗯。
t_en: Yeah.

t_ch: 准确来说，是她有事想请你帮忙。
t_en: To be precise, it's her who wants help with something.

t_ch: …嗯，是我。你可能也看出来了，我身上的气息与特征，和阮•梅本人很像。
t_en: ...Well, it's me. You may have noticed that I have the same aura and traits as Ruan Mei herself.

t_ch: 连这里的造物都时常把我俩搞混。
t_en: Even the creations here get the two of us mixed up.

t_ch: 你确实很像阮•梅女士，所以我才一直跟着你……
t_en: You really do look very similar to Miss Ruan Mei. That's actually why I keep following you around...

t_ch: 大家总是很想念她，还有造物会小声喊我「妈妈」…但很遗憾，我并不是阮•梅。
t_en: Everyone misses her so much, and I even hear some creations whimper "Mommy"... But unfortunately, I am not Ruan Mei.

t_ch: 我想为它们做些力所能及的事……
t_en: I want to do whatever I can for them...

t_ch: 你想让阮•梅探望它们？
t_en: Do you want Ruan Mei to pay them a visit?

t_ch: 如果可以，那自然最好。不过我想，以她的性子，大抵是不会回来了。
t_en: If she could, that would be best. But knowing her temperament, I don't think she'll be coming back.

t_ch: 你打算怎么做？
t_en: What do you want to do?

t_ch: 我想拜托你拍张大合照。
t_en: I'd like you to take some group photos of everyone.

t_ch: 我知道你在空间站手眼通天，想必能联系上阮•梅女士。
t_en: You know all the tricks aboard the space station, so I know you must have a way of reaching Miss Ruan Mei.

t_ch: 我们想请你拍几张照片，再把照片发给她。
t_en: We'd like you to take some photos and send them to her.

t_ch: 先说我的要求——我和她的合照，请务必发给她看，我很好奇她和黑塔看了会有什么反应。
t_en: First up, here's my official request: A photo of me with her, and you have to send it to her. I'm curious about how she and Herta will react.

t_ch: 然后是拍其他造物的大合照。你可以多拍几张发给她。
t_en: And then a group photo of all the other creations. You can take a few photos and send her all of them.

t_ch: 嗯，就算没有「已读」也没关系，至少能传达大家的心意……
t_en: And well, even if she leaves the messages unread, at least we'll be passing on everyone's feelings...

t_ch: 没问题。
t_en: No problem

t_ch: 放心吧，她肯定会看的。
t_en: Don't worry, she'll definitely check it out.

t_ch: 那就拜托你了。
t_en: I'm counting on you then.

t_ch: 好香咪，这里有好多好吃的，这下可以边吃边睡了呼！
t_en: Yum, there are so many yummy snacks here. Now I can snack while I snooze!

t_ch: 呼噜呼噜！
t_en: *snoring*

t_ch: 造物们边吃边睡，口水与食物残渣流了一地，你与保姆机器人忙得团团转，才把这里收拾干净。
t_en: The creations are eating and sleeping, with drool and crumbs all over the floor. You and the Helper Robot dart about trying to clean up everything.

t_ch: （呃，糟糕，好像喷错了…还是赶紧改回来吧。）
t_en: (Er, drat... I think that's the wrong symbol... Better change it back, quick.)

t_ch: 好恶心……
t_en: So gross...

t_ch: 臭臭的……
t_en: It stinks...

t_ch: 有造物在马桶上睡着了，空气中弥漫着不妙的味道。
t_en: One creation is sleeping on the toilet. A putrid stench fills the air.

t_ch: （呃，糟糕，好像喷错了…还是赶紧改回来吧。）
t_en: (Er, drat... I think that's the wrong symbol... Better change it back, quick.)

t_ch: 好舒服！
t_en: That feels so good!

t_ch: 你的尾巴可以挪过来点吗？我缺个枕头。
t_en: Can you move your tail over here? I need a pillow.

t_ch: 造物们在这里安静地休息，你舍不得打破这份温馨。
t_en: The creations are resting peacefully here. You don't dare to interrupt this quietude.

t_ch: 不行我要站中间，不许抢我镜头，把我拍好看点！
t_en: No, I have to stand in the middle. Don't steal my best angle. Make sure I look good!

t_ch: 你已经很好看啦，不知道阮•梅会不会第一时间发现我……
t_en: You already look great. I wonder if Ruan Mei will be able to notice me straight away...

t_ch: 你们这些小家伙，站过去点，听那个大个子指挥！
t_en: You little ones, stand over there. Listen to the big fellow now, understood!

t_ch: 藤萝饼和「拉姆之友」吸引了许多造物靠近，它们似乎被它们身上的某种气息所折服，又或是为之沉醉。
t_en: Wisteria Cake and "Lambda's Friend" attract many creations to come nearby, with an aura that seemingly captivates them, or perhaps intoxicates them.

t_ch: 是、是要发给阮•梅看的！
t_en: I—It's going to be sent off to Ruan Mei!

t_ch: 我还没洗脸……
t_en: I haven't cleaned up yet...

t_ch: 阮•梅想我们了吗？
t_en: Does Ruan Mei miss us?

t_ch: 要不然怎么会拍合照呢？
t_en: Why would we take a group photo otherwise?

t_ch: *开心地哼唱*
t_en: *happily humming*

t_ch: 阮•梅造物们手拉手～
t_en: Creations of Ruan Mei, let's join our hands~

t_ch: 大家围成一圈～
t_en: Form a circle, everyone~

t_ch: 阮•梅把笑与泪～
t_en: Tears of joy for Ruan Mei~

t_ch: 揉进我们的馅儿～
t_en: Add it to our stuffing~

t_ch: 我亲眼看见的，那个虫子将她吞了进去！一个瘦弱的小妹妹…就这么被虫子活活吞进去了，天啊……
t_en: I saw it with my own eyes, that beetle swallowed her! A frail little girl... swallowed by a beetle alive!

t_ch: 你在哪儿看见的，我怎么没看到？
t_en: Where did you see it? 'Cuz I didn't.

t_ch: 就在药物制备间下层，不是有道门？一出去就看到了。
t_en: There's a door on the lower level of the Pharmaceutical Room. It was right outside there.

t_ch: 接驳车站吗？那边是挺危险的…可怜的小妹妹，等等，她还活着吗？她该不会……
t_en: The shuttle station? It is quite dangerous over there... Poor girl... wait, is she still alive? Could she have...

t_ch: 肯定活着呢，我走的时候还听到她隔着肚皮在喊呢！她就在虫子肚子里！
t_en: She's definitely still alive! I could still hear her yelling for help through the beetle's outer shell when I left. She's still inside the beetle's stomach!

t_ch: 虫子将她吞了进去！
t_en: The beetle swallowed her!

t_ch: 有没有人啊！快来人！救救那个小妹妹！她被虫子吞到肚子里了。
t_en: Is anyone there!? Help! Save that little girl! She was swallowed by that beetle!

t_ch: 被虫子吞了？这要怎么救啊？
t_en: Swallowed? So how are we supposed to save her?

t_ch: 呃…外科手术，开肠破肚？
t_en: Um... Through an opening? Maybe open the beetle up?

t_ch: 那也得先把虫子打晕吧，我可没这身手……
t_en: Well, you gotta knock that beetle out first. I certainly can't...

t_ch: 快来人！救救她！
t_en: Somebody help! Save her!

t_ch: 它的模样让你想起了一位故人，将它梳洗一番后，你为它拍下了特写照。
t_en: Its appearance reminds you of an acquaintance. After giving it a quick groom, you take a close-up photo of it.

t_ch: 造物们对这里的一切很满意，它们给你留了点「小礼物」。
t_en: The creations are all very pleased with everything here. They have left you a "little gift".

t_ch: …那些可怜的巡海游侠，至死也没发现，此人正是「毁灭」纳努克的化身。
t_en: ...Even till their deaths, those poor Galaxy Rangers had no idea this person was actually the incarnation of Nanook, the Destruction.

t_ch: 这个故事到此就结束了。
t_en: Our story ends here.

t_ch: 无名客，你也是来听故事的吗？
t_en: Nameless one, are you here to listen to a story, too?

t_ch: 你认识我？
t_en: You know me?

t_ch: 我认识你吗？星辰的孑遗、语言的残片、命运散乱的支线、诗篇中唯一的标点。是的，我认识你。
t_en: Do I know you? A relic of the stars, a fragment of language, a scattered branch of fate, the lone piece of punctuation in a poem. Yes, I know you.

t_ch: 我以为你不会感到意外。
t_en: I didn't think you'd be surprised.

t_ch: 你会讲故事？
t_en: Do you tell stories?

t_ch: 我会讲故事吗？枷锁千钧而穿行于薄冰、灰色的情感顺着刀尖滴落、矫饰的真实形成悖谬。是的，我会讲故事。
t_en: Do I tell stories? Shackled, skating 'cross thin ice, go grayed emotions, dripping down the knife's edge as pretentious truth forms scornful paradox. Yes, I've been known to tell a story or two.

t_ch: 我以为你正是为此而来的。
t_en: I thought that's why you came here.

t_ch: 你…你在和它对话？！
t_en: You... Are you talking to it!?

t_ch: 听到你与那只鸟的对话，隐书从书肆的柜台后翻了出来，跑到了你们面前。
t_en: Hearing you chat with the bird, Yinshu pops out from behind the counter and runs over to you.

t_ch: 你你你你怎么能和它对话？！
t_en: H—h—h—how can you talk with it!?

t_ch: 我做错事了吗？
t_en: Have I done something wrong?

t_ch: 不能和它对话吗？
t_en: Am I not supposed to talk with it?

t_ch: 啊…抱歉…我只是有些吓到了。别担心，你没做错什么…应该是没做错什么吧……
t_en: Ah... Sorry... I just got a little freaked out there. Don't worry. You haven't done anything wrong... at least you probably haven't done anything wrong...

t_ch: 西衍先生把这鸟放在我这里好几天了…这还是我第一次听到它和人说话呢！
t_en: Mr. Xiyan has had this bird here for days now... but this is the first time I'm hearing it actually talk with a human!

t_ch: 我听它在给小朋友们讲故事。
t_en: I heard it telling some children a story.

t_ch: 这家伙叫「游辞」，它确实是会讲故事，但是…它可从来不和人「对话」啊！
t_en: They call this guy "Youci," and it actually does tell stories, but... it's never ever engaged in a dialogue with people before!

t_ch: 而且这鸟怕生得很，一开始甚至不肯离西衍先生太远…一旦看不到西衍先生就不停地啸叫。
t_en: It's so afraid of strangers that at first it wouldn't let Mr. Xiyan out of its sight... As soon as he strayed off, it'd start screeching.

t_ch: 也就最近这几天，它才逐渐习惯了在三余书肆门口当活招牌。但我还是不能掀开笼子上的布，不然它还是会鬼哭狼嚎。
t_en: But the last few days, it's slowly grown accustomed to life as a living door sign for the Spare Time Book Shop. But I still can't lift the cloth on its cage for fear of it shrieking like a vengeful ghost.

t_ch: 现在有人围在周围，它就自顾自讲故事，没人围在周围，它就像个普通的鸟一样吃了睡、睡了吃。
t_en: Now, when people are around, it just goes about telling stories to itself. But when there's nobody around, it eats, sleeps, and excretes just like a normal bird.

t_ch: 像刚才那样，和人有来言有去语的对话，我可是第一次见到啊！
t_en: But that kind of back-and-forth conversational dialogue that I saw just then? That's the first time I've ever seen that!

t_ch: 游辞呀～你刚才是不是和{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}对话来着？
t_en: Youci~ Were you just talking with {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 游辞？我照顾你那么久了，你也和我聊聊天嘛～
t_en: Youci? How long have I taken care of you now? C'mon, say something...

t_ch: 唔…这蠢鸟，气死我了。
t_en: Hmph... This stupid bird. So frustrating.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你要听我讲故事吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, would you like me to tell you a story?

t_ch: 还真是只和你一个人说话啊！怎么搞的，你能通鸟语吗？还是你有什么特别之处…能让这只鸟对你另眼相看？
t_en: It really does only talk to you! Do you understand bird language, or is there something special about you... that has this bird giving you special treatment?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我想给你讲个故事。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, let me tell you a story.

t_ch: 请讲吧。
t_en: Go on.

t_ch: 这是一个颇为激烈的故事……
t_en: This is rather intense...

t_ch: 还有别的事。
t_en: Something came up.

t_ch: 你先去忙吧，我再和它僵持一会儿！就不信这鸟不肯开口！
t_en: Off you go and do that, then. I'll try and continue to get it to talk. I can't believe this bird refuses to talk!

t_ch: …就这样，{NICKNAME}取得了胜利。{F#她}{M#他}的威名再一次传遍了整个银河。
t_en: ...And just like that, {NICKNAME} was victorious. {F#Her}{M#His} fame spread throughout the cosmos once again.

t_ch: 这个故事到此就结束了。
t_en: Our story ends here.

t_ch: 怎么感觉真的打了一架…
t_en: Why did that feel like a real fight?

t_ch: 唉…正常情况。你看这鸟笼的样子就知道，它肯定不是普通的鸟。听它讲完故事，就是会莫名觉得…这故事似乎真的发生过。
t_en: *Sigh*... That's pretty normal. You can tell just by looking at its cage that it's no ordinary bird. Once you hear it tell a story, you have this inexplicable feeling that... that this story really did happen.

t_ch: 真的发生过吗？
t_en: Did it really happen?

t_ch: 没发生过吧。游辞讲的故事都有些不着四六，怎么听都不像是真的发生过。
t_en: It never happened, right? Youci's stories are all a bit zany and never sound as though they really happened.

t_ch: 我不记得这段冒险。
t_en: I don't remember that adventure.

t_ch: 不记得就对了，这应该是它编出来的吧。游辞讲的故事都有些不着四六，怎么听都不像是真的发生过。
t_en: It's normal that you don't remember, because it just cut that story out of whole cloth, right? Youci's stories are all a bit zany and never sound as though they really happened.

t_ch: 仔细一想，是有这么一回事！
t_en: Now that I think about it — it happened!

t_ch: 真的发生过吗！呃…我还以为全都是它编的呢！游辞讲的故事都有些不着四六，怎么听都不像是真的发生过。
t_en: It happened!? Um... I thought it was all made up! Youci's stories are all a bit zany and never sound as though they really happened.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你喜欢刚才的故事吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, did you like that story?

t_ch: 它又在和你对话了……
t_en: It's talking with you again...

t_ch: 隐书妹妹在吗？我要买书～
t_en: Is Yinshu here? I'd like to buy a book~

t_ch: 啊，有客人来了。算了，我也不自讨没趣了，你和游辞慢慢交流感情吧。我回去工作了。
t_en: Ah, a customer. Forget it then. You and Youci take your time getting acquainted. I'll get back to work.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我还有很多故事可以讲给你听。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I've got many more stories I could tell you.

t_ch: 为什么是我？
t_en: Why me?

t_ch: 如若银河是一颗行星，你便是最主要的卫星。关于你的传奇，牵动着每一片海的潮汐。
t_en: If all the cosmos were a planet, you would be its largest moon. And your legend would impel the tides in every ocean there is.

t_ch: 听我讲故事，你也会得到一些好处。摸摸你的口袋吧。
t_en: Listen to my story, and you'll get something out of it. Reach into your pockets.

t_ch: 你摸了摸身上的口袋，发现多了一个奇怪的东西。
t_en: You reach into your pocket only to discover something strange.

t_ch: 这是宝贵的财富。只有两种存在得以获赠——诗人及其母题。
t_en: This is a precious asset. Only two things exist to be given: The poet and their leitmotif.

t_ch: 对话到此为止吧，我并不擅长。若你想听故事，可随时找我。我有很多故事可以讲给你听。
t_en: That's enough conversation for now. I'm not the best at this. Stop by any time if you'd like to hear a story. I've got lots of stories to tell you.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你要听我讲故事吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, would you like me to tell you a story?
